versions.version_description: This interpretation as a simplification of the chords it includes a capo on 1 and the repetitive riff.

This is a fingerstyle/ chord arrangement of the video version of the song. The melody and bass notes are provided feel free to flesh out the finger picking as the song develops. I wrote the tabs with a capo on the first fret but still in reference to the nut so just use the fingerings as though you were playing open.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Here's my version of "Enjoy the Silence". I've transcribed this version
in a slightly different key than the original tune - I also transcribed
this version for SOLO acoustic guitar, so if you want to play this song
in it's original key just use a capo. You can always use other voicings
of these chords to make the song sound more authentic. I like using SUS
Chords because they allow the tune to remain more open sounding - since
SUS chords don't typically dictate a Major or Minor feel they actually
allow the player to dictate the songs mood (which can easily be changed
to a Minor feel with the addition of 1-note in the given Sus-2 chords).
The original tune uses Minor chords instead of SUS chords.
Questions/Comments . . . ianvomsaal@yahoo.com
Transcribed by: Ian C.T. vom Saal - October 9, 2003


[ch]Bsus2[/ch] = x24422
[ch]Bbsus2[/ch] = x13311
[ch]Asus2[/ch] = x02200
[ch]Dm[/ch] = xx0231
[ch]G[/ch] = 320033

Depeche Mode - Enjoy the Silence


[Intro] 

[[ch]Bsus2[/ch]] [[ch]Dm[/ch]]
 
[Verse 1]

[[ch]Bsus2[/ch]]Words like violence
[[ch]Dm[/ch]]Break the silence
[[ch]G[/ch]]Come crashing in - Into my little world
[[ch]Bsus2[/ch]]Painful to me
[[ch]Dm[/ch]]Pierce right through me
[[ch]G[/ch]]Can't you understand - Oh my little girl
 
[Chorus]

[[ch]Em[/ch]]All I ever wanted
[[ch]G[/ch]]All I ever needed
Is [[ch]Bsus2[/ch]]here in my [[ch]Asus2[/ch]]arms
[[ch]Em[/ch]]Words are very [[ch]G[/ch]]unnecessary
[[ch]Bsus2[/ch]]They can only do [[ch]Bbsus2[/ch]]harm


[Instrumental]

[[ch]Bsus2[/ch]] [[ch]Dm[/ch]] [[ch]G[/ch]] 2x


[Verse 2]

[[ch]Bsus2[/ch]]Vows are spoken
[[ch]Dm[/ch]]To be broken
[[ch]G[/ch]]Feelings are intense - Words are trivial
[[ch]Bsus2[/ch]]Pleasures remain
[[ch]Dm[/ch]]So does the pain
[[ch]G[/ch]]Words are meaningless - And forgettable


[Chorus]

[[ch]Em[/ch]]All I ever wanted
[[ch]G[/ch]]All I ever needed
Is [[ch]Bsus2[/ch]]here in my [[ch]Asus2[/ch]]arms
[[ch]Em[/ch]]Words are very [[ch]G[/ch]]unnecessary
[[ch]Bsus2[/ch]]They can only do [[ch]Bbsus2[/ch]]harm


[Verse 1]

[[ch]Bsus2[/ch]]Words like violence
[[ch]Dm[/ch]]Break the silence
[[ch]G[/ch]]Come crashing in - Into my little world
[[ch]Bsus2[/ch]]Painful to me
[[ch]Dm[/ch]]Pierce right through me
[[ch]G[/ch]]Can't you understand - Oh my little girl


[Chorus]

[[ch]Em[/ch]]All I ever wanted
[[ch]G[/ch]]All I ever needed
Is [[ch]Bsus2[/ch]]here in my [[ch]Asus2[/ch]]arms
[[ch]Em[/ch]]Words are very [[ch]G[/ch]]unnecessary
[[ch]Bsus2[/ch]]They can only do [[ch]Bbsus2[/ch]]harm

[[ch]Em[/ch]]All I ever wanted
[[ch]G[/ch]]All I ever needed
Is [[ch]Bsus2[/ch]]here in my [[ch]Asus2[/ch]]arms
[[ch]Em[/ch]]Words are very [[ch]G[/ch]]unnecessary
[[ch]Bsus2[/ch]]They can only do [[ch]Bbsus2[/ch]]harm

Enjoy the silence
